# Appendix Table D1 (Fitting Results Including Inner 2 pc)

Authors: Zucker, Catherine
Published: 2021-08-18T23:57:27Z
Subjects: Astronomy and Astrophysics
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/V8NGLX

This dataset summarizes the radial profile fitting results when the inner 2 pc of the profile (radial distances between 0 and 2 pc) are included. These results have lower goodness of fit compared to when the inner 2 pc are excluded, so we report the full profile results here for completion only. Users should defer to the restricted profile (r > 2 pc) results at for most purposes.

Citation: Zucker, Catherine, 2021, "Appendix Table D1 (Fitting Results Including Inner 2 pc)", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/V8NGLX, Harvard Dataverse, V1
